fineGrainedToolStreaming.notes: Use sparingly on fast tier — small tool inputs only

extendedThinking.notes: Avoid large budgets on fast tier; prefer Sonnet for tool+thinking loops

Prompt caching + count_tokens — ANTHROPIC_PROMPT_CACHING.md · ANTHROPIC_TOKEN_COUNTING.md. Japanese MMLU 96.8% — excellent. 1M context; platform compaction.
